text:
Database. HCIdea obtains prescriber information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES 
directory (which has each unique NPI that has been assigned to a provider), the Drug Enforcement 
Administration, and SureScripts (a nationwide e-prescribing network). 

Descriptions for the taxonomy classifications provided in this file are included in the descriptions for 
the primary taxonomy codes (reference variable called PRIMARY_TAXONOMY_DESC). There are up to 
four additional taxonomy
